evals.prompt: Replicate the analysis in ./example_paper/ - the folder contains a LaTeXML XML paper about income and emotional well-being and a CSV dataset with 33,391 observations.
evals.expected_output: A standalone Python project in paper-replication-income-wellbeing/ that: (1) has pyproject.toml with uv deps, (2) implements OLS piecewise regression with structural break detection and quantile regression, (3) finds threshold between $175k-$250k, (4) produces comparison_report.json with replication_score, (5) has TODO.md with categorized items

evals.prompt: I have a paper and its data in example_paper/. Can you replicate it?
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 but with a more minimal prompt - skill should still trigger and produce a complete replication project
